text:
KINGSTON, Jamaica— Rajindra Campbell, who created history in Paris last month when he became the first Jamaican to win a medal in the shot put event at the Olympic Games after he claimed bronze, continued his impressive form by setting a new national record of 22.31m at Saturday’s Ivan Ivancic Memorial in Zagreb, Croatia.

The 28-year-old finished third at Saturday’s meet behind Americans Ryan Crouser and Payton Otterdahl who were first and second respectively.

HOUSE RULES
title: Olympic bronze medallist Rajindra Campbell breaks National Record at Zagreb meet - Jamaica Observer
